CONTENT.Career: On 27 January 2020, FC Kairat announced the signing of Alykulov on a two-year contract, with the option of a third. On 11 May 2023, Alykulov bought out the remainder of his contract with Kairat and left the club.On 4 August 2023, Alykulov re-signed for Neman Grodno.
CONTENT.Honours: KairatKazakhstan Premier League: 2020IndividualKyrgyzstan Footballer of the Year: 2019

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 16 April 2023As of match played 28 March 2023Scores and results list Kyrgyzstan's goal tally first.

SUMMARY: Gulzhigit Zhanybekovich Alykulov (Kyrgyz: Гүлжигит Алыкулов; Russian: Гулжигит Жаныбекович Алыкулов; born 25 November 2000) is a Kyrgyzstani professional footballer who plays for Neman Grodno.
